name: Jancarlo L. Rojas
title: Systems & AI Consulting | IT Architecture | Workflow Automation
summary: Information Technology student at Florida State University targeting systems consulting and IT architecture roles. Focused on how organizations can deploy AI tools and automation into existing workflows to drive measurable efficiency gains — not replacing systems wholesale, but making what's already in place work significantly better. Hands-on experience designing and evaluating system architectures, implementing AI-driven automation, and translating technical solutions into clear business outcomes. Combines deep analytical thinking with a consulting mindset: understand the system, identify the friction, implement the fix.
